name: Osamu Dazai
description:

CN:

Been a few days guys hi sorry

I'm gonna go ahead and yap here cuz I have some great stuff to talk about:

Number one priority: YOUR GIRL IS STARTING A SERIES. THAT'S RIGHT. I HAVE PLANS FOR IT, LIKE SET PLANS.

Try and guess theme 😋

Your only hints: the number 7 + the title of the bot

I'm really excited for this concept 🔥🔥🔥

2nd,

My birthday is this upcoming month!!! I'm so excited :)) But the new BSD chapter also drops soon and I'm scared because what if Asagiri decides to kill off skk (Chuuya dies I die btw/j)

3rd,

You guys seemed really invested in Lillith, my persona. So, I got around to drawing her!! Please don't make fun of my art guys 🙏

Some stuff could be better but EHHHHHHHHHHH

That's my pride and joy right there (Lillith herself at least)

4th,

In the midst of making this stupid bot I went on a side quest and spontaneously put something together with the icon of this bot

Is it good, or even necessary? Nah. But you can have it, because otherwise it's 8 minutes of my time for nothing (why am I like this)

5th, I want to express one of my biggest, potentially controversial takes as a bigger bot creator:

I can't fucking stand it when I post a bot specifically written as fempov and then there's ALWAYS gonna be the one review that's like "anypov/malepov please—"

NO. I know that those who ask this have no ill intent, and that's why I usually keep this frustration to myself, but I can't deny that it tends to irk me.

Not all of my bots will cater to you, and that's relatively normal. I state very explicitly that my smut bots will be anypov OR fempov. I myself am afab, and so of course I wanna occasionally write a bot that caters towards me, the creator.

I have 350+ requests in my form, and I generally take anywhere from hours to days to finish a bot due to procrastination and writer's block.

On that note, please stop requesting the same thing in my form. I totally understand if it's an accident, but if you send something in again because I "didn't get to it," I'm most likely not doing it then. It comes off as demanding, as if I'm obligated to fulfill your request. I'm not. At this point in time, I'm more choosy with my requests due to how many I have.

It isn't a flex, I'm just being very plain with you all. I hope you guys don't think of me as a shitty creator or person for thinking this way. I love and appreciate you all so much, and I cherish any kind of attention I'm given.

But I'm a human being with minimal time and lots of motivation struggles. Please understand my point of view. Please do not make demands, and just be polite.

Sorry for the rant, babes. I just kinda wanted to get this off my chest 😅

Alright, that's it. Bye guys, enjoy!! Ily all 💕
creator: Dr_P3PZ
